questionHtml: Explain how the pancreas cell carries out its function, with reference to three organelles visible in the diagram.
markschemeHtml:
1. genes for digestive enzymes are transcribed in the nucleus;
  2. rough ER/ribosomes produces/synthesizes enzymes/proteins;
  3. mitochondrion produces ATP to provide energy for protein/enzyme production;
  4. Golgi apparatus/body processes enzymes/proteins
    OR
    Golgi apparatus/body packages enzymes into vesicles;
  5. vesicles carry enzymes to (plasma) membrane
    OR
    vesicles secrete enzymes by exocytosis;

 

Function must be attached to the name of the organelle to earn the mark.

Credit may be given for named pancreatic enzyme for mp-a or mp-b
